description_long: This object is a carved stone statue depicting a seated human figure with detailed facial features and a headdress, holding a lion-headed or animal-headed figure on its lap. The front of the block features a panel with intricate hieroglyphic inscriptions, suggesting an ancient or historical context. The stone is dark and appears weathered, with a matte, rough surface texture. The back of the statue is less detailed, showing the outline of the figure's back and headdress. The base is oval and solid, providing stability and a surface for additional inscriptions. The overall craftsmanship and iconography indicate it is likely a ceremonial or commemorative monument.
description: A dark, weathered stone statue of a seated figure with a headdress, holding an animal-headed figure, and inscribed with hieroglyphs on the front panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the seated figure in profile, with the animal-headed figure clearly visible and the headdress details prominent.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and headdress, with minimal detail and a solid, rounded back surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the other profile of the seated figure and the animal-headed figure, with less detail on the inscriptions.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the face, headdress, animal-headed figure, and the inscribed panel with hieroglyphs in full detail.
attribute_installation_method: set directly on the ground or a stone platform
attribute_weathering_pattern: Surface appears weathered and rough, with some smoothing on protruding features and minor chipping on edges.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Hieroglyphic inscriptions and carved details are visible on the front panel and figure.
